Pursuant to my employment agreement, I will receive a performance-based bonus for services rendered in 2024 up to the date of my departure from the company in July 2024. This bonus will be paid prior to my assuming the duties of the position of Chief Financial Officer. (2020-03-01)

Pursuant to company policy and in accordance with a severance agreement executed on July 1, 2024, I will receive twelve months base salary severance, paid on a biweekly basis until July 31, 2025. (2020-03-01)
